loading.reason: storage reads go through the synchronous chrome shim; this view has no async loading state

error.reason: local storage reads have no failure path; this view renders no error UI

empty.reason: Empty History has no rows, so the clickable-row behavior this feature adds cannot manifest; the empty state is unchanged.

single.reason: A single row exercises the identical clickable-row behavior as typical; no distinct visual or interaction state.

many.reason: Row count does not change row interaction; history-populated already shows the multi-row list.

loading.reason: History reads synchronous localStorage via the chrome shim; there is no async loading state.

edge.reason: Edge typography renders the same clickable row; HistoryRow component scenarios cover row variants (no-timestamp, monogram fallback).

error.reason: localStorage reads have no failure path; this view renders no error UI.

key-interaction.reason: The row-click reopen calls chrome.tabs.create with no in-view state change to capture; covered by HistoryRow unit tests and the driven demo click.

single.reason: A single active tab is a thinner typical; the sidebar gauge and grid layout are unchanged.

loading.reason: Home reads synchronous localStorage; there is no async loading state.

error.reason: No failure path renders differently on the Home view.

empty.reason: An empty Load page is just the heading with no URL cards; no dedicated empty-state UI to demonstrate (covered by the Load unit test).

single.reason: One active tab is a thinner typical with identical card layout.

many.reason: load-page's 7 tabs already exercise the wrapping card grid; no distinct overflow/truncation treatment.

loading.reason: The URL list reads synchronous localStorage; there is no async loading state.

edge.reason: load-page includes a long Gmail title exercising title wrap; no separate edge state needed.

error.reason: No failure path renders differently; localStorage reads cannot fail visibly.

key-interaction.reason: Gauge to Load and Home-link back navigation is shown in the demo-flow filmstrip, not a static app scenario.

empty.reason: Single-record edit form, not a list — there is no empty-list state. The 'not in any group yet' empty-groups variant is shown by url-details-unlabeled.

single.reason: edit form, not a list — a single group membership renders the same chip treatment as multiple, no distinct visual state

many.reason: Single-record edit form, not a list — no overflow/many state. A URL in multiple groups renders the same removable-chip treatment shown in url-details-edit.

loading.reason: the form hydrates synchronously from local storage on mount via the chrome shim; no pending/loading UI is rendered

edge.reason: edge typography (very long title/notes, unicode) is deferred to the scenarios-and-seeding capstone plan; no distinct branch in this component

error.reason: the form has no validation/failure UI; local-storage reads and writes do not surface error states

key-interaction.reason: Save persists then navigates to Home and remove-group pops a native confirm; neither yields a distinct seeded display state to capture for this view
